case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. MARK LAGLEVA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $719.49 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT LAGLEVA, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-01-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAGLEVA, MARK
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAGLEVA, MARK $719.49 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $719.49, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
